{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = King of all Dragons
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Monarch]] of Dragons is a title or entity [[Ekeri]] obeys.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
